args: MODE=${LOGOS_MEMORY_MODE:-global}; if [ "$MODE" = project ]; then export LOGOSDB_PATH=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.logosdb; else export LOGOSDB_PATH=$HOME/.codex/.logosdb; fi; command -v logosdb-mcp-server >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec logosdb-mcp-server || exec npx --yes logosdb-mcp-server
